items.title: Ayatul Kursi
items.arabic: اللَّهُ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْحَيُّ الْقَيُّومُ ۚ...
items.translation: Allah! There is no deity except Him, the Ever-Living...

items.title: Dua for Forgiveness
items.arabic: رَبَّنَا ظَلَمْنَا أَنفُسَنَا وَإِن لَّمْ تَغْفِرْ لَنَا...
items.translation: Our Lord, we have wronged ourselves...

items.title: Sajdah (Prostration)
items.translation: Glory is to my Lord, the Most High.
